title: Hello! Letter A
description: Your very first letter — A. Press it with your left pinky.
text: a a a a a a a a a a
tips: Press gently, like a key on a piano

character_tips.anna: Hello, little friend! Press A with your left pinky 🌸
character_tips.maxim: First letter. Pinky finger. Gentle press.
character_tips.knopych: Hi there! 🤖 Press A! That's it!
character_tips.klavochka: Hello, my dear! 🌷 Just one letter today. Press A. Soft fingers!
